docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT SPACCIA, ENZO

FORM SCF45: JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850- NOT ACCEPTED BY SYSTEM: " A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT IS ON FILE FOR THE SELECTED PARTY".
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SPACCIA, ENZO
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 28319, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,916.26 FILED BY BORSUK, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT SPACCIA, ENZO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-14-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BORSUK, MARK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPACCIA, ENZO $1,139.81 PRINCIPAL, $109.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,248.81 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BORSUK, MARK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPACCIA, ENZO $1,914.26 PRINCIPAL, $109.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,023.26, $150 ATTORNEY FEES; THE COURT FINDS APPELLANT RESPONSIBLE FOR ALL UNREIMBURSED COSTS OF REPAIR, INCLUDING $1888.26 UNREIMBURSED FLOOR REPAIR COSTS & $26.UNREIMBURSED DRY CLEANING EXPENSE.ATTORNEY'S FEES AWARDED UNDER CCP116.780. APPEAL WAS NOT TAKEN IN BAD FAITH AS REQUIRED FOR ANY FURTHER AWARD UNDER CCP116.790, WHICH IS THEREFORE DENIED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SPACCIA, ENZO
JUDGEMENT ENTERED ON SCA 28319 ON 03/01/07. NO EXHIBIT RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION.
